description_long: This is a stylized, double-headed axe with a large, turquoise blade featuring gold trim and geometric accents. The blade is thick and rectangular, with a pointed gold finial at the top and a matching gold edge at the rear, which is adorned with three pyramid-shaped studs. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and segmented, with a metallic gray shaft and gold and red grip sections at the base. The axe head appears to be securely mounted to the handle, with the gold elements providing both structural and decorative functions. The overall design is ornate and fantasy-inspired, with a robust build that suggests ceremonial or decorative use as much as practical function. The color palette is dominated by turquoise, gold, and red, giving the axe a striking and regal appearance.
description: A stylized, double-headed turquoise and gold axe with a straight, segmented handle and ornate geometric accents. The design is robust and decorative, featuring a thick blade and pyramid-shaped studs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full turquoise blade, gold trim, and the three gold pyramid studs on the rear edge.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the blade and gold accents clearly visible.
description_view_3: Front view showing the three gold pyramid studs and the pointed gold finial at the top of the blade.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle, segmented with metallic gray shaft and gold/red grip, likely wood or metal core, no curvature, round cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Thick, rectangular double-headed blade with turquoise body, gold trim, pointed finial, and three gold pyramid studs on the rear; no beard, blunt poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible gold collar securing the blade to the handle.
